prompt: Emergency evacuation poster for a space station rendered in the distinctive pictographic style of airport safety instruction cards
prompt_refined: An emergency evacuation poster for a space station, rendered in the distinctive, minimalist pictographic style of airport safety instruction cards. The design should feature bold, clear line art and a limited, high-contrast color palette (e.g., black, white, red, yellow). Depict universal symbols and sequential instructions for space-specific emergencies, ensuring immediate comprehension.
